mapper.select: SELECT id, limit_key, type, limit_count, period, capacity, tokens_per_second, message, enabled, description, created_at, updated_at FROM rate_limit_config
SELECT id, limit_key, type, limit_count, period, capacity, tokens_per_second, message, enabled, description, created_at, updated_at FROM rate_limit_config WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, limit_key, type, limit_count, period, capacity, tokens_per_second, message, enabled, description, created_at, updated_at FROM rate_limit_config WHERE limit_key = #{limitKey}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO rate_limit_config (limit_key, type, limit_count, period, capacity, tokens_per_second, message, enabled, description) VALUES (#{limitKey}, #{type}, #{limitCount}, #{period}, #{capacity}, #{tokensPerSecond}, #{message}, #{enabled}, #{description})
mapper.update: UPDATE rate_limit_config SET type = #{type}, limit_count = #{limitCount}, period = #{period}, capacity = #{capacity}, tokens_per_second = #{tokensPerSecond}, message = #{message}, enabled = #{enabled}, description = #{description} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM rate_limit_config WHERE limit_key = #{limitKey}
